mapper.insert: INSERT INTO challenges ( host_id, title, description, category_id, entry_fee, verification_method, cert_frequency, daily_cert_limit, success_criteria_rate, ai_review_enabled, start_date, end_date, max_participants, status, cert_start_time, cert_end_time, feed_visibility ) VALUES ( #{hostId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{categoryId}, #{entryFee}, #{verificationMethod}, #{certFrequency}, #{dailyCertLimit}, #{successCriteriaRate}, #{aiReviewEnabled}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{maxParticipants}, #{status}, #{certStartTime}, #{certEndTime}, #{feedVisibility} )
mapper.sql: id, host_id, title, description, category_id, entry_fee, verification_method, cert_frequency, daily_cert_limit, success_criteria_rate, ai_review_enabled, start_date, end_date, max_participants, status, created_at, updated_at, cert_start_time, cert_end_time, feed_visibility, thumbnail_url
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM challenges WHERE id IN
#{challengeId}
mapper.sql: c.id, c.title, cat.id AS category_id, cat.name AS category_name, c.entry_fee, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM challenge_participants p WHERE p.challenge_id = c.id AND p.status = 'ACTIVE') AS current_participants, c.max_participants, c.start_date, c.end_date, c.status, c.thumbnail_url
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM challenges c JOIN categories cat ON cat.id = c.category_id
ORDER BY c.entry_fee ${direction.name()}, c.id DESC
ORDER BY current_participants ${direction.name()}, c.id DESC
ORDER BY c.created_at ${direction.name()}, c.id DESC
LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT
FROM challenges c JOIN categories cat ON cat.id = c.category_id JOIN challenge_participants cp ON cp.challenge_id = c.id WHERE cp.user_id = #{userId} AND cp.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY c.created_at DESC, c.id DESC

SELECT c.id, c.host_id, u.nickname AS host_nickname, c.title, c.description, cat.id AS category_id, cat.name AS category_name, c.entry_fee, c.verification_method, c.daily_cert_limit, c.success_criteria_rate, c.ai_review_enabled, c.start_date, c.end_date, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM challenge_participants p WHERE p.challenge_id = c.id AND p.status = 'ACTIVE') AS current_participants, c.max_participants, c.status, c.cert_start_time, c.cert_end_time, c.feed_visibility, c.thumbnail_url, c.created_at FROM challenges c JOIN categories cat ON cat.id = c.category_id LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = c.host_id WHERE c.id = #{id}

SELECT c.id, c.title, c.status, c.start_date, c.end_date, c.max_participants, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM challenge_participants p WHERE p.challenge_id = c.id AND p.status = 'ACTIVE') AS current_participants, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM challenge_participants p WHERE p.challenge_id = c.id AND p.result = 'SUCCESS') AS success_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM challenge_participants p WHERE p.challenge_id = c.id AND p.result = 'FAIL') AS fail_count FROM challenges c WHERE c.id = #{id}
SELECT FROM challenges WHERE id = #{id} FOR UPDATE
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM challenge_participants p JOIN challenges c ON c.id = p.challenge_id WHERE p.challenge_id = #{challengeId} AND p.status = 'ACTIVE' AND p.user_id != c.host_id
mapper.update: UPDATE challenges SET status = 'IN_PROGRESS' WHERE status = 'RECRUITING' AND start_date <= CURRENT_DATE
mapper.select: SELECT FROM challenges WHERE status = 'IN_PROGRESS' AND end_date < CURRENT_DATE
